text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! The Japanese Derby?! You're asking if I wanna compete in it? Like, if I want to run it, I can?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: It's giving mad pressure, but... I'm in! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: The Derby... There's no way I'm gonna lose here! I'm gonna make this my race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... Ryan is hella fired up... I've definitely
gotta keep an eye out on her, but there's an even
bigger threat I have to watch out for...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heya-hey! Time to warm up! ♪ One, two, one,
two!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There's Ines Fujin, the godly front runner who's
equally bad news!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin is Mejiro Ryan's roommate, and she's
considered the strongest front runner out of her
year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: If Ines and I duke it out for the front... We're gonna wipe both ourselves out waaay before we reach the finish, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'd better go say hi and try to keep us from going
overboard. Gotta stay calm and carry on! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, Palmer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Good luck and have fun to us both for the Derby
today! Let's take it easy out there and have a
good time, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We can live it up on the track with Ryan too!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if you're a Mejiro, but I'm not letting
some rogue beat Ryan! ♪ Also...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm giving you the lead! I can't be
held responsible for what'll happen if you try to
steal it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, see ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yikes! I just wanted to make things better, but I
totally made things go nuclear instead! Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer starts to panic and I immediately
make a heart shape with my hands to calm her
down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, right. Keep it cute and keep it cool...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Who cares about the others, anyway? I just have
to focus on running my way!
